_comment: Sample per-IP intelligence (the full file ships the top flagged IPs daily). Each entry is the ffraud engine's own verdict: a 0-100 fraud score, a plain-English reason, and threat categories. No upstream source is ever named.

examples.reason: Identified as part of a botnet network. Credential stuffing and login brute force attempts across multiple services. Exploiting web server vulnerabilities and launching HTTP attacks. Spam and automated registration abuse across multiple platforms. Persistent high-severity threat confirmed across 5+ independent monitoring networks. Located in a high-risk network neighborhood where 88% of the /24 subnet is flagged for abuse.

Active command & control (C2) server used to coordinate malware operations. Identified as part of a botnet network. Persistent high-severity threat confirmed across 5+ independent monitoring networks. Located in a high-risk network neighborhood where 100% of the /24 subnet is flagged for abuse.

Actively distributing malware payloads to compromised systems. Heavy attack activity confirmed by threat intelligence monitoring. Located in a high-risk network neighborhood where 100% of the /24 subnet is flagged for abuse.
